text: The subject is located in a neighborhood on the northside of Chenoa, IL. The subject is located in a community on the southwestside of Bloomington, IL. It is a single family detatched ranch designed house. It conforms to most other existing homes in the neighborhood in condition, design, and quality. Chenoa is considered a bedroom community and residents participate in local agriculture or commute to Pontiac or Bloomington-Normal for employment.
